name: Path of Exile
description: Build calculation via headless Path of Building
limitations: Build calculation only — no live character data yet
Requires a PoB build code (base64 export string)
Timeless jewel calculations are not supported

pob_calc.name: PoB Build Calculator
pob_calc.description: Run a Path of Building build code through the PoB calc engine. Returns structured DPS, defence, resistance, skill, item, and passive tree data. Use when the player shares a PoB build code (a long base64 string) and wants analysis, optimization advice, or comparison.

build_code.description: PoB build code — the base64 string players share (e.g. from pastebin, discord, reddit). This is NOT an XML document; it is the compressed export code from Path of Building.
